name: DGX Cloud Lepton
description: Registers a DGX Cloud Lepton OpenAI-compatible endpoint as a first-party chat provider using configured model IDs.

env.description: Optional fallback DGX Cloud Lepton OpenAI-compatible endpoint base URL when no base_url Plugin Setting is configured. The plugin accepts HTTPS Lepton endpoint URLs under /api/v1 or /v1.
Optional fallback Lepton API key used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.
Optional fallback Lepton API token used for inference when no api_key Plugin Setting or LEPTON_API_KEY is configured.
Optional comma-separated model IDs exposed by the Lepton endpoint when no model_ids Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: Lepton base URL
settings.description: DGX Cloud Lepton endpoint base URL from the endpoint API tab. The plugin accepts provider-owned HTTPS domains ending in /api/v1 or /v1, or appends /api/v1 when only the endpoint origin is supplied.

settings.label: Lepton API key
settings.description: Optional Lepton API key or token used as a bearer token for inference. Falls back to LEPTON_API_KEY and then LEPTON_API_TOKEN.

settings.label: Lepton model IDs
settings.description: Model IDs to expose for the Lepton endpoint. Use IDs returned by the endpoint /models response or the deployed model name. Falls back to comma-separated LEPTON_MODEL_IDS.

providers.name: DGX Cloud Lepton
providers.description: Registers configured DGX Cloud Lepton OpenAI-compatible chat models and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.
